title: selaginella caesia
intro: Selaginella caesia, also known as the black bead moss or black prayer plant, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella caesia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
